title: Domain Protection State Schema
description: Schema for validating domain protection and recovery state records.

protection_state_id.description: Unique identifier for this protection state instance.

domain_state_id.description: The ID of the domain this protection state applies to.

owner_player_id.description: The player ID of the domain owner.

current_protection_state.description: The current protection status of the domain.

triggering_resolution_id.description: The ID of the resolution that triggered this protection state (if applicable).

recent_attack_count.description: Number of recent attacks on this domain.

same_attacker_repeat_count.description: Number of repeat attacks from the same attacker/party.

recovery_required.description: True if the domain is currently in a state requiring active recovery.

recovery_progress.description: Current progress of the domain's recovery (0.0 - 1.0).

protection_expires.description: True if the current protection state will expire naturally.

permanent_immunity_granted.description: Must be false. Protection must not grant permanent immunity.

domain_recoverable.description: Must be true. The domain must always remain recoverable.

playability_restored_before_next_invasio.description: Must be true. Playability is restored before next valid invasion.

escalating_cost_required_for_repeat_atta.description: Must be true. Repeat attacks require escalating cost.

forbidden_flags.description: Flags to ensure anti-griefing and fair play.

permanent_domain_lock.description: Must be false. Domain cannot be permanently locked.

permanent_immunity.description: Must be false. Domain cannot have permanent immunity.

unrecoverable_damage.description: Must be false. Domain cannot incur unrecoverable damage.

repeat_attack_without_cost.description: Must be false. Repeat attacks cannot occur without escalating cost.

full_conquest_from_failed_safe.description: Must be false. No full conquest from failed safe sessions.
